goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 17:00' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'sunday' and should depart from 'peterborough'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'entertainment'.
Make sure you get 'area', 'address', and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 17:00 and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on sunday and should depart from peterborough
Make sure you get travel time
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of entertainment
Make sure you get area, address, and phone number
